Maharashtra.a: Ladki Bahin Yojana gives ₹1500/month to women aged 21-65 with family income below ₹2.5L. Apply at ladakibahin.maharashtra.gov.in.
MJPJAY scheme provides free healthcare up to ₹1.5L for BPL families. Visit jeevandayee.gov.in.
PM Kisan gives ₹6000/year to farmers. Apply at pmkisan.gov.in with land records and Aadhaar.
PM Awas Yojana offers up to ₹2.67L housing subsidy. Apply at pmaymis.gov.in.
PM Ujjwala provides free LPG connection to BPL women. Visit pmuy.gov.in.

Uttar Pradesh.a: Kanya Sumangala Yojana gives ₹25,000 to girls in stages. Apply at mksy.up.gov.in.
UP Vridha Pension provides ₹1000/month to elderly BPL citizens. Visit sspy-up.gov.in.
Ayushman Bharat covers ₹5L/year free healthcare. Visit pmjay.gov.in.

Gujarat.a: Vahali Dikri Yojana provides ₹1.1L over years for first two daughters. wcd.gujarat.gov.in.
MA Yojana free treatment up to ₹5L. Visit magujarat.com.

Rajasthan.a: Chiranjeevi Health Insurance covers ₹25L. Visit chiranjeevi.rajasthan.gov.in.

Bihar.a: Kanya Utthan ₹50,000 to graduate girls. medhasoft.bih.nic.in.
